c1611233e486.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
c1611233e486.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
c1611233e486.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

305260e0aa45.title: Renew formal trust proof before it becomes a visible drag
305260e0aa45.description: Last inspected 2.9 years ago. A stale inspection date erodes trust scoring and signals to customers that compliance isn't actively managed. Request a voluntary re-inspection once you're confident of a strong result.
305260e0aa45.expected_upside: Fresh compliance proof, trust signal renewal
305260e0aa45.management_implication: Stale trust is a hidden ceiling on your overall position.

b7d4ba6432d8.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
b7d4ba6432d8.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

b2ea1236f40a.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
b2ea1236f40a.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
b2ea1236f40a.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

bb6556aac7e0.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
bb6556aac7e0.description: At 194 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
